mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, category, category_name as categoryName, total_questions as totalQuestions, wrong_questions as wrongQuestions, correct_rate as correctRate, weakness_level as weaknessLevel, update_time as updateTime FROM learning_weakness WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND correct_rate < #{threshold} ORDER BY correct_rate ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO learning_weakness (user_id, category, category_name, total_questions, wrong_questions, correct_rate, weakness_level, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.category}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.totalQuestions}, #{item.wrongQuestions}, #{item.correctRate}, #{item.weaknessLevel}, #{item.updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_weakness SET total_questions = #{totalQuestions}, wrong_questions = #{wrongQuestions}, correct_rate = #{correctRate}, weakness_level = #{weaknessLevel}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT category as category, category_name as categoryName, total_questions as totalQuestions, wrong_questions as wrongQuestions, correct_rate as correctRate, CASE WHEN correct_rate >= 0.9 THEN '精通' WHEN correct_rate >= 0.7 THEN '熟练' WHEN correct_rate >= 0.5 THEN '一般' ELSE '薄弱' END as masteryLevel FROM learning_weakness WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY correct_rate DESC
